lifecycle_invariants: every transition is a governance action with a declared actor and rationale
no environment may be silently retired; deprecation precedes retirement
no quarantined environment may resume active state without auditor co-signature
every transition emits an environment-lifecycle-trace event
tombstones are immutable; retired environments are never re-activated under the same id

lifecycle_states.description: infrastructure declared; not yet receiving traffic
receiving traffic under declared supervision level
active with elevated audit; promotion or demotion pending
frozen at last state; reads only; no new writes
isolated due to safety event; no traffic; replay-only access
tombstoned; provenance retained; no infra; no surfaces

lifecycle_transitions.requires: raised finding or health indicator threshold
finding closed; no open critical health indicators
safety event or replay drift > floor
incident closed; replay deterministic; rollback verified
